hooks.command: if command -v ox >/dev/null 2>&1; then AGENT_ENV=codex ox agent hook PostToolUse 2>&1 || true; else echo 'This repo uses SageOx: install https://github.com/sageox/ox for optimized team context.'; fi
if command -v ox >/dev/null 2>&1; then AGENT_ENV=codex ox agent hook PreToolUse 2>&1 || true; else echo 'This repo uses SageOx: install https://github.com/sageox/ox for optimized team context.'; fi
if command -v ox >/dev/null 2>&1; then AGENT_ENV=codex ox agent hook SessionStart 2>&1 || true; else echo 'This repo uses SageOx: install https://github.com/sageox/ox for optimized team context.'; fi
if command -v ox >/dev/null 2>&1; then AGENT_ENV=codex ox agent hook Stop 2>&1 || true; else echo 'This repo uses SageOx: install https://github.com/sageox/ox for optimized team context.'; fi

if command -v ox >/dev/null 2>&1; then AGENT_ENV=codex ox agent hook UserPromptSubmit 2>&1 || true; else echo 'This repo uses SageOx: install https://github.com/sageox/ox for optimized team context.'; fi
